title: FileHound — Sequential Entity ID Sweep Actor Input

sourceState.title: Source state (2-letter code)
sourceState.description: The state this actor is fetching. Used as source_state in Supabase.

idUrlTemplate.title: Entity detail URL template
idUrlTemplate.description: URL for a single entity's detail page. Use {ID} as a placeholder for the entity ID.

idPadLength.title: ID zero-pad length
idPadLength.description: If the state's IDs are fixed-width with leading zeros (e.g. Alabama's 9-digit format), set the total digit length here. Leave 0 to use the ID as-is.

startId.title: Starting entity ID (first run only)
startId.description: Used only if no prior records exist for this state in Supabase. On subsequent runs the actor automatically resumes from the highest ID already collected.

sweepCount.title: IDs to check this run
sweepCount.description: How many sequential IDs to attempt in a single run, starting from the cursor.

consecutiveMissesToStop.title: Consecutive misses before stopping early
consecutiveMissesToStop.description: If this many IDs in a row return 'not found', stop the sweep early (we've likely caught up to not-yet-issued IDs).

requestDelayMs.title: Delay between requests (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Politeness delay between each HTTP request to avoid hammering the state's server.

notFoundIndicatorText.title: Text indicating 'entity not found'
notFoundIndicatorText.description: A string that appears on the page when an entity ID doesn't exist. Used to detect misses.

selectors.title: CSS selectors (JSON object)
selectors.description: CSS selectors for extracting fields from the entity detail HTML. Keys: businessName, entityType, status, filingDate, streetAddress, city, state, zip, registeredAgent.

calibrationMode.title: Calibration mode
calibrationMode.description: Dumps raw HTML and selector attempts for the first 5 IDs checked, without upserting. Use this to discover the real page structure and fix selectors.

dryRun.title: Dry run
dryRun.description: Parse and normalise but do NOT upsert to Supabase.
